settings.label: Brand logo (reversed for dark bg)
settings.info: Used in header + footer. Falls back to /assets/signageworks-logo-reversed-for-dark-bg.png.

settings.label: Inky mascot avatar
settings.info: Round PNG used in the Ask Inky chat launcher. Falls back to /assets/inky-mascot.png.

settings.label: Hero background video
settings.info: Looping background video on the hero. Falls back to /assets/octopus-hero.mp4.

settings.content: Note: the live CSS variables (--cyan, --magenta, etc.) are locked at brand values inside signageworks-base.css. These pickers are exposed for forward-compat / future CTA-color overrides only.

settings.label: Apply form endpoint
settings.info: Backend URL the apply form POSTs to. Expects JSON body { property_name, applicant_name, role, email, phone, unit_count, source }.

settings.label: Chat API URL (optional)
settings.info: If set, Ask Inky will POST { message } here and expect { reply } back. Leave blank to use the built-in keyword-driven mock bot.
